user_query:
Please read my February 2026 finance commands from input/commands.csv (columns: date,time,command). Parse each line as if I typed it live, apply smart categorization, budgets, split-logic, payment methods, and income vs expenses, and round all amounts to 2 decimals in USD. Then write the following files:

1) output/expenses.json — an array of all parsed expenses (not including income or budget commands). Each object should have: id, amount, currency, category, description, payment_method (or null), date (YYYY-MM-DD), time (HH:MM), tags (array, can be empty).
2) output/income.json — an array of income entries with: id, amount, source, date, notes (or null).
3) output/budgets.json — budgets set by the commands with: id, category, amount, period ("monthly"), created (YYYY-MM-DD).
4) output/summary_feb_2026.json — computed summary for February 2026 with fields: month ("2026-02"), total_expenses, total_income, net_savings, by_category (object of category totals).
5) output/insights.md — at least 3 specific spending insights and 2 concrete action suggestions based on the parsed data.

Important parsing details to follow:
- "gas" alone is Transport; "gas bill" is a utility Bill.
- "split 120 dinner with 3 friends" should log only my share (total/4) under Food.
- "groceries 95 via card" should set payment_method to "card".
- Use the exact dates and times from the CSV for each entry.

Please make sure the JSON files are valid and consistent across all outputs.
